===================
===================
=== text file.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan Globe Arena Stockholm, Sweden 9 June 1998 

CD1: 
1. All along the watchtower 
2. Tonight Ill be staying here with you 
3. Cold Irons Bound 
4. Every grain of sand 
5. Silvio 
6. Desolation row 
7. One too many mornings 
8. Tangled up in blue 
9. Make you feel my love 
10. This wheels on fire 
11. Highway 61 revisited 

CD2: 
1. Forever young 
2. Love Sick 
3. Rainy day women #12&35 
4. Blowing in the wind

Core Sound Binaurals  Sharp MD-702  Philips CD-recorder  CDR  EAC  WAV  FLAC  DIME

This recording of this great concert was seeded a while ago but it had breaks between the songs. Here is a correct version without the bonus tracks.
This is a different recording from the Crystal Cat Boot At the Globe Arena.
===================
